title: Customer Service Chat
scenario: Create a customer service chat transcript for a 30-year-old male who is asking about a refund policy. The transcript should be 5-7 sentences long, include a greeting and closing message, and use a friendly tone.
constraints: Must include a greeting and closing message

evaluationCriteria.description: Check that the transcript is within the 5-7 sentence limit and includes a greeting and closing message.
Check that the transcript has a friendly tone suitable for a customer service chat.
Check that the transcript is consistent with the voice and tone of a customer service chat for a 30-year-old male.
